description: A UAV design team is building a parametric geometry model for a MALE UAV. The aerodynamics lead has written a fuselage cross-section specification document located at ~/Desktop/fuselage_spec.txt. Read this spec file, then open OpenVSP and create a new model that includes: (1) A Fuselage (FuseGeom) component matching the length and cross-section shapes/dimensions specified in the document, and (2) A Wing (WingGeom) component matching the specified span and root chord. Save the completed model to ~/Documents/OpenVSP/male_uav.vsp3.
